name: Moment of Sentencing
descs:
[Effects apply only to #3, #4 Deployed Identities]

Unopposed Slash Skills deal +10% damage

Clash Win: Slash Skills deal +(40/# of remaining Coins)% damage

[Effects apply only to #3, #4, and <style="upgradeHighlight">#5</style> Deployed Identities]

Unopposed Slash Skills deal +10% damage

Clash Win: Slash Skills deal +(40/# of remaining Coins)% damage

[Effects apply only to #3, #4, #5, and <style="upgradeHighlight">#6</style> Deployed Identities]

Unopposed Slash Skills deal <style="upgradeHighlight">+12.5%</style> damage

Clash Win: Slash Skills deal +(<style="upgradeHighlight">50</style>/# of remaining Coins)% damage
